name: Sugarplums
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Gradually add salt, baking powder, sugar, and vanilla extract while beating egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold in chocolate chips into the beaten egg whites.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
5. Turn off the oven and place the cookie sheet inside overnight or at least for 5-6 hours.
